reviews.comment:
excelente estacion

(Translated by Google)
Excellent station
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4aVBuTERnEAE

reviews.comment:
Servicio de playa y baños EXELENTES  personal atento y educado ..ahora la cafeteria ..UN CAFE CON LECHE 900 PESOS. UN SANGUCHE JAMON Y QUESO 1500 .PESOS.  CAFE CON LECHE Y MEDIAS LUNAS 1400 PESOS
.....para una estacion de servicio SON PRECIOS ELEVADOS ...cargue agua caliente en el termo   50 pesos la ficha y me fui .....SEÑOR EMPRESARIO VERIFIQUE SUS PRECIOS ....SON MUY ELEVADOS ..........

(Translated by Google)
Excellent beach service and restrooms, attentive and polite staff... Now, the cafeteria... A coffee with milk is 900 pesos. A ham and cheese sandwich is 1500 pesos. A coffee with milk and croissants is 1400 pesos.
...For a gas station, these are high prices... I filled my thermos with hot water for 50 pesos per token and left... Mr. Business Owner, please check your prices... They are very high...

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su comentario. Intentaremos mejorar la próxima vez!
